headline: Southern California Celebrates First Equitable Building Decarbonization Project
impact: This first equitable building decarbonization project in SoCal sets a precedent, potentially guiding future program design and funding for TEC clients.

headline: CEC Approves Third Major Clean Energy Project Under  Opt-In Certification Program
impact: CEC approval of a major clean energy project advances grid decarbonization, but has limited direct impact on TEC clients' demand-side programs.
